rules.title: Authentication Implementation Required
rules.description: System must implement authentication mechanisms to verify user identity
rules.remediation: Implement authentication using industry-standard libraries (e.g., Passport.js, Auth0, JWT). Create auth middleware and protect sensitive routes.

rules.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
rules.description: System must implement role-based access control to restrict access based on user roles
rules.remediation: Implement RBAC using libraries like casbin or accesscontrol. Define roles, permissions, and access policies.

rules.title: Structured Logging Implementation
rules.description: System must implement structured logging for security event monitoring
rules.remediation: Implement structured logging using winston or pino. Log authentication attempts, authorization failures, and security events.

rules.title: Audit Trail Logging
rules.description: System must maintain audit logs for security-relevant events
rules.remediation: Implement audit logging that captures user actions, data access, and system changes with timestamps and user context.

rules.title: Encryption at Rest
rules.description: Sensitive data must be encrypted at rest
rules.remediation: Use bcrypt or argon2 for password hashing. Implement encryption for sensitive data fields using AES-256 or similar.

rules.title: Encryption in Transit
rules.description: Data must be encrypted in transit using TLS/SSL
rules.remediation: Configure HTTPS/TLS for all network communications. Use valid SSL certificates and enforce TLS 1.2 or higher.

rules.title: Application Performance Monitoring
rules.description: System must implement monitoring and alerting for performance and security events
rules.remediation: Implement APM using Sentry, Datadog, or New Relic. Configure error tracking and performance monitoring.

rules.title: Version Control System
rules.description: Code must be managed in a version control system
rules.remediation: Initialize Git repository and commit all code. Implement branching strategy and code review process.

rules.title: CI/CD Pipeline
rules.description: Automated testing and deployment pipeline must be implemented
rules.remediation: Set up CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or similar. Include automated tests, security scans, and deployment steps.

rules.title: Secrets Management
rules.description: Secrets and credentials must not be hardcoded in source code
rules.remediation: Use environment variables for secrets. Implement secrets management using tools like HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, or similar.
